description: Internal contract renewal prep — logistics and action items only, should be skipped

input.title: Eddie / Sarah / Tom - Contract Renewal Prep: Horizon Group
input.markdownContent:
### Renewal Strategy

- Price increase of 8% discussed
- Key champion is Yemi Adeyemi, Head of TA — positive in every conversation but doesn't control budget
- Budget holder is the CFO who we've never spoken to
- Strong usage data: 340 assessments, 91% hiring manager satisfaction

### Open Items

- ROI deck not ready — Sarah finishing it today
- Need to confirm Workday integration is stable — issue reported 3 weeks ago
- Tom to confirm reference letter was sent to Yemi in May

### Next Steps

- Sarah to send ROI deck by tonight
- Tom to confirm Workday integration issue resolved
- Eddie to prep concession options in case CFO pushes on price

expectedOutput.skipReason: All participants are Spotted Zebra employees and content is internal commercial prep — no customer-reported product feedback. Workday integration mention is an internal action item, not a customer complaint.
